content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 SketchDeck: SEO + AI Search Specialist (Contract/Part-Time) Anywhere in the World New York AI Research, AI Strategy, AI Governance, SEO, SEO Optimization, Technical SEO, SEO Writing, and AI Agents Design Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/2710/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://sketchdeck.com/">https://sketchdeck.com/</a> </p> <h2>The Role</h2> <p>AI-driven discovery is reshaping how audiences find brands, and we are helping our clients lead the way — across AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and beyond. We are looking for a senior SEO and AI search specialist contractor to help our clients show up where their audiences are searching now. Approximately 10 hours per week, ongoing, across a mix of B2B and B2C projects.</p> <h2>What You Will Do</h2> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; Audit and strategy: Conduct technical and content SEO audits, identify AI search visibility gaps, and recommend prioritized roadmaps.</p> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; AI search optimization: Improve client visibility in Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini through structured data, entity optimization, citation strategy, and answer-first content.</p> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; Keyword and content strategy: Lead keyword research, search intent mapping, and content briefs for both traditional SERPs and AI surfaces.</p> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; Technical SEO: Review crawlability, indexation, schema, Core Web Vitals, and rendering. Partner with client or internal dev teams on fixes.</p> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; Measurement and reporting: Set up and interpret performance data across GA4, Google Search Console, Ahrefs/SEMrush, and AI visibility tools (Profound, Otterly, Peec AI).</p> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; Tool exploration: Help us evaluate new AI search tools as they emerge. Curiosity matters.</p> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; Cross-functional collaboration: Brief our writers and designers on SEO/AEO requirements and join client calls as the SEO subject matter expert.</p> <h2>Who You Are</h2> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; 5–10+ years of hands-on SEO experience across technical, on-page, and content optimization. Agency or enterprise background preferred.</p> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; Active work in AI search optimization — AEO, GEO, and AIO. We know this space is new; we want someone experimenting with real results to point to, not someone claiming a decade of expertise that doesn't exist yet.</p> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; Fluent in the modern tool stack: Ahrefs or SEMrush, Google Search Console, GA4, Screaming Frog, Schema.org, and at least one AI visibility tracker.</p> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; Strong content instincts. You understand how editorial quality, entity clarity, and answer-first structure drive both rankings and AI citations.</p> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; Clear communicator. You can translate technical concepts for non-technical clients and write recommendations creative teams can act on.</p> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; Comfortable with ambiguity. You test, measure, and adjust rather than wait for settled best practices.</p> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; Mix of B2B and B2C experience, ideally including technical/enterprise B2B and consumer brands.</p> <h2>Nice to Have</h2> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; International or multi-region SEO experience.</p> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; Working knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript as they relate to SEO.</p> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; Familiarity with Webflow, WordPress, or HubSpot CMS.</p> <p>• &nbsp; &nbsp; Published thought leadership or community presence in SEO/AI search.</p> <h2>Benefits:</h2> <p><strong>Hours:</strong> ~5-10 hours per week, with flexibility to scale for project needs</p> <p><strong>Rate:&nbsp;</strong>$100–$150 per hour, commensurate with experience</p> <p><strong>Location:&nbsp;</strong>Remote (global)</p> <p><strong>Start:</strong> Immediate, with an initial 90-day evaluation period</p> <h2>How to Apply</h2> <p>Send a short note about your background, resume with links to relevant work (especially AI search visibility examples), and your hourly rate. We are most interested in concrete results — a client whose AI Overview presence you grew, a schema implementation that moved the needle, an audit that surfaced something non-obvious.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sketchdeck-seo-ai-search-specialist-contract-part-time">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sketchdeck-seo-ai-search-specialist-contract-part-time</a></p> Thu, 07 May 2026 18:50:31 +0000 Sat, 06 Jun 2026 18:50:31 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sketchdeck-seo-ai-search-specialist-contract-part-time https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/sketchdeck-seo-ai-search-specialist-contract-part-time silverorange: Digital Product Lead Anywhere in the World 🇨🇦 Canada Prince Edward Island Product Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/0794/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Charlottetown, PE <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.silverorange.com/">https://www.silverorange.com/</a> </p> <h3><strong><span>The company</span></strong></h3> <div><span>silverorange is a design and development agency based in Canada. When pursuing work, we focus on interesting and meaningful projects. Over our 26 years as a company, we've worked with well-known technology organizations like Duolingo and Mozilla, not-for-profit organizations working in areas including </span><a href="https://blog.silverorange.com/usability-for-promotion-codes-and-access-codes"><span>affordable internet access for low-income families</span></a><span>, and with </span><a href="https://www.emrap.org/"><span>world-renowned doctors training other doctors</span></a><span> through online education.</span></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><span>We’re proud of the fantastic products we’ve built in partnership with our clients and we’re actively invested in the processes behind these products. We are committed to fostering a team-focused approach in our work of building great user-focused systems, while also placing a serious emphasis on quality of life, openness, empathy, and a supportive work environment.</span></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <h3><strong><span>The position</span></strong></h3> <div><span>We’re looking for a Digital Product Lead to join our team.&nbsp;</span></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><span>This role is responsible for working with one of our largest medical education clients to </span><span>translate their product vision and strategy into an actionable roadmap for current and future work across multiple project teams and platforms. This role will
